title: Report a problem
description: Tell us what went wrong — we'll attach the technical details for you.
noticed: Problems detected: {{count}}. The details will be attached to your report.
noticedNone: Nothing was detected automatically — your description is what matters most.

step1.heading: What happened?
step1.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Layers disappear when I zoom in
step1.expectedLabel: What did you expect to happen?
step1.expectedPlaceholder: e.g. The layer should stay visible

step2.heading: Review what we'll send
step2.subtitle: Everything below is optional — uncheck anything you'd rather not include.
step2.privacyNote: We automatically remove your login token and personal info before anything leaves your browser.
step2.privacyDetail: Login tokens, API keys, and email addresses are stripped from the report before it is sent.

step3.heading: Send your report
step3.subtitle: We'll open a pre-filled GitHub issue. Review it, then submit.
step3.truncatedToast: The logs were too long for the link — the full report was copied to your clipboard. Paste it into the issue.
